sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: 3 green blocks collected and no game over! The strategy works - after filling the bottom bar with 9 purple pixels by clicking all 9 dots, I can now collect green blocks without game over. I've collected 3 so far (at cols 15, 21, 27 on row 27), leaving 11 more. Let me collect all remaining green blocks.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# 3 green blocks collected after filling bottom bar! No game over!
# Strategy confirmed: fill bottom bar with 9 dot clicks, then collect green blocks
# 11 green blocks remaining

seg = current_frame.segmentation
green = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"Green blocks remaining: {len(green)}")

# Get remaining green block positions
for g in green:
    b = g['boundary']
    min_r = min(x[0] for x in b)
    min_c = min(x[1] for x in b)
    print(f"  Green at row={min_r}, col={min_c}")

# Collect all remaining green blocks
# From image: top row has 4 blocks remaining (cols 33, 39, 45, 51)
# Bottom row has 7 blocks (cols 15, 21, 27, 33, 39, 45, 51)
# But some were already collected from top row
# Let me just collect all remaining by clicking their centers

remaining = []
for g in green:
    b = g['boundary']
    min_r = min(x[0] for x in b)
    min_c = min(x[1] for x in b)
    # Click center of block (blocks are ~6x6, so center is +3,+3)
    remaining.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': min_r + 3, 'col': min_c + 3})

print(f"Collecting {len(remaining)} remaining green blocks")
action(remaining)
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game_tier": {"action_semantics": {"LEFT": "Moves player left ~6 columns", "MOUSE": "After filling bottom bar, can collect green blocks without game over", "RIGHT": "Moves player right ~6 columns"}, "hud_map": {"bottom_bar": "purple+white at row 63, needs 9 purple pixels to unlock green collection"}, "level_log": {"level2": "Found solution: click all 9 dots to fill bar, then collect green blocks"}, "cross_level_notes": "Level 2 requires filling bottom bar before collecting green blocks"}, "level_tier": {"world_model": "Level 2: 11 green blocks remaining after collecting 3", "goal_model": "Collect all remaining green blocks", "recent_findings": ["Filling bottom bar with 9 dot clicks unlocks green block collection", "3 green blocks collected successfully"], "current_plan": "Collect all 11 remaining green blocks", "failed_probes": ["Batch MOUSE on green without filling bar: game over"]}}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
